testcase.name: test_6_invalid_topic_400
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter71_topic.py:229: in test_6_invalid_topic_400 assert r.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 per spec, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 per spec, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"literal_error","loc":["body","topic"],"msg":"Input should be 'Career Guidance', 'Technical Discussion' or 'HR Discussion'","input":"Random","ctx":{"expected":"'Career Guidance', 'Technical Discussion' or 'HR Discussion'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/literal_error"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
